message:
style: rustfmt pass on extensions tests, cross-surface parity, and JSON mode parity

Pure formatting changes from cargo fmt with no behavioral modifications:

src/extensions.rs:
- Reformatted multi-line function call in interleave test to standard
  rustfmt indentation
- Expanded chained assert_eq! calls in get_model test for readability

tests/cross_surface_parity.rs:
- Sorted use imports (clap before pi) per rustfmt convention
- Expanded inline array arguments in Cli::parse_from calls to one-per-line
- Reformatted unsafe set_var/remove_var blocks with explicit braces
- Normalized assert_eq! formatting for list_models, append_system_prompt
- Adjusted comment alignment in append_compaction and model_change tests
- Expanded multi-line assert! messages

tests/json_mode_parity.rs:
- Reformatted harness.log().info_ctx() chains throughout extension UI
  schema tests (select, confirm, input, editor, notify, setStatus,
  setWidget, setTitle, payload flattening, timeout, rich options,
  lifecycle) from compressed inline closure to standard method-chain style
- Expanded array literals (expected_order, fire-and-forget methods list,
  all-methods list) to one-per-line
- Reformatted ExtensionUiRequest::new() calls with long arguments
- Normalized boolean/null assertion chains

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
